title: johreniopsis oligactis
intro: Johreniopsis oligactis, also known as the false golden ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Johreniopsis oligactis include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and potential antimicrobial effects. Johreniopsis oligactis can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and recommended dosages.
